fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Vendor Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry number of the vendor ledger entry that the detailed vendor ledger entry line was created for.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry type of the detailed vendor ledger entry.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the detailed vendor ledger entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the detailed vendor ledger entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the transaction that created the entry.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the detailed vendor ledger entry.

fields.name: Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the entry in LCY.

fields.name: Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor account to which the entry is posted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the currency if the amount is in a foreign currency.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: Debit Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits, expressed in LCY.

fields.name: Credit Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits, expressed in LCY.

fields.name: Initial Entry Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the initial entry is due for payment.

fields.name: Initial Entry Global Dim. 1
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Global Dimension 1 code of the initial vendor ledger entry.

fields.name: Initial Entry Global Dim. 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Global Dimension 2 code of the initial vendor ledger entry.

fields.name: Initial Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type that the initial vendor ledger entry was created with.

fields.name: Unapplied
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the entry has been unapplied (undone) from the Unapply Vendor Entries window by the entry no. shown in the Unapplied by Entry No. field.

fields.name: Unapplied by Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the correcting entry, if the original entry has been unapplied (undone) from the Unapply Vendor Entries window.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's market type to link business transactions to.
